title: crataegus laevigata var. vulgaris
intro: Crataegus laevigata var. vulgaris, also known as the midland hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus laevigata var. vulgaris include cardiovascular support, improved blood circulation, and potential anti-aging effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
